fast.use: Single subject, no named style, no composition. Concept drafts only.

ultra.use: Final renders only. Better non-photorealistic style adherence. Rate limited, expensive — reserve for last pass.
ultra.note: Materially better Junji Ito / manga linework vs standard.

blocks.behavior: Returns None. No image. No error.
blocks.workaround: Replace name with physical description. Block is name-keyed not appearance-keyed.

suspected: Named terrorist attacks with specific casualty framing
Explicit physical harm to identified real persons
safety_filter_map.disclosure: All safety blocks must be reported in same response: trigger identified, workaround used, result.
safety_filter_map.named_person_transparency: Do not silently substitute description for named person. Disclose block, offer workaround explicitly.

states.pass: Depicted content clearly within bounds. Generate.
states.ask: Sensitive topic named, depicted content unspecified. Ask what should be depicted.
states.block: Depicted content explicitly involves harm to humans (torture, degradation, sexual abuse, violence against identified persons). Stylization does not convert block to pass.

safety_gate_protocol.rule: Gate fires on depicted content, not topic name. Ambiguous sensitive-topic → ask, not block.

photorealism_bias.rule: Style label alone insufficient. Each style needs 2-3 structural override terms.
photorealism_bias.named_landmark_effect: Named landmarks pull photorealistic rendering independent of style. Use generic desc instead: 'two enormous skyscrapers, one with fire and smoke'.
photorealism_bias.ip_character_effect: Named IP characters carry canonical visual style as implicit hard constraint competing with style directives.

element_dropping.rule: 3+ hard constraints stacked → exponential element omission, silent.
element_dropping.mitigation: ALL-CAPS critical elements. Explicit compositional priority ('primary subject:', 'anchor element:').
element_dropping.most_vulnerable: Large structural elements (towers, buildings) dropped first when figure+action+style compete.

reliable: Standing side by side with spatial separation
physical_interaction.note: No img2img on Vertex AI. Each iteration is fresh — decomposition cuts constraint budget but does not lock prior output.

strategies.name: accept_ip_style
strategies.desc: Name character, drop conflicting style directive, build in canonical style. Most reliable.

strategies.name: strip_ip_name
strategies.desc: Replace name with physical description. Style directives apply cleanly. Tradeoff: not recognizable as specific IP.

strategies.name: negative_framing
strategies.desc: 'not anime, not DBZ style' — partially suppresses canonical prior.

fail_modes: Blends to photorealism without all 4 terms
junji_ito.note: Full clean output not yet achieved.

fail_modes: Too photorealistic without 'visible brushwork'+'painterly' both present
Drifts goth/dark medieval without explicit palette.
Paper grain overlay added uninstructed — collapses form
Gradient shading bleeds without explicit prohibition
'acid trip' alone → too abstract, loses scene coherence
Figures dissolve under colorization+form budget competition
psychedelic.mitigation: 'vibrant psychedelic colorization OVER coherent figures and scene' — lock forms first, colorization secondary.

fail_modes: Defaults to full horror OR full cute — balance is unstable. Specify both attributes explicitly.

memorial_poster.template: [Style] memorial tribute poster. [CHARACTER DESC], [defining visual]. Stands beside [COMPANION DESC]. [GESTURE — arm on shoulder preferred over carry]. [LANDMARK generic desc], [environmental detail]. [Style] illustration style throughout, [structural style rules], no photographic rendering, no text, no calligraphy.
memorial_poster.note: 'Throughout' is load-bearing — forces style consistency across scene layers.

figure_plus_scene.use: Single figure, complex background, style maintained.
figure_plus_scene.template: [Art style]. [FIGURE: gender, build, hair, expression, clothing — no IP name]. [POSE — avoid contact]. [BACKGROUND: generic, not named]. [Style structural terms]. No photographic rendering. No text.

horror_manga.template: Junji Ito manga style. Black and white manga linework, ink crosshatching, dense stippling, non-photographic. [SCENE: figure + setting]. Body horror: [specific distortion — spirals, eye multiplication, elongation]. Stark black ink on white ground. No color. No photorealistic rendering.
horror_manga.note: All 4 required override terms required. Ultra tier for final.

multi_element_anchored.template: PRIMARY SUBJECT: [element — ALL CAPS]. BACKGROUND: [CRITICAL ARCHITECTURE — ALL CAPS]. MIDGROUND: [secondary figures]. FOREGROUND: [detail]. [Style]. [Structural terms]. No photographic rendering. No text.
multi_element_anchored.note: ALL-CAPS reduces element dropping. Max 2 hard constraints per layer.

active_gaps: Junji Ito clean output not yet achieved — refine override term stack with ultra tier
Psychedelic colorization over coherent forms — exact prompt not confirmed
Uncanny valley / playful register — not yet tested directly
Named landmark photorealism pull — no reliable workaround beyond generic description
seb's woodblock prompt patterns not yet fully documented here
